theme: One string maximizing weighted DFA acceptance
title: One Passphrase, Many Gatekeepers
strategies: single-DFA baseline: pick the heaviest DFA that has any reachable accepting string within Lmax, output only its own shortest accepting string

weight-priority merge: process DFAs heaviest-first, greedily extend a shared candidate string whenever the next DFA's requirement is consistent with what is already committed, else skip it permanently

weighted product-automaton search: track every reachable joint (per-DFA) state as the string is extended symbol by symbol, and take the best total weight seen at any reachable joint state up to length Lmax -- a genuine subset-selection DP, not a priority order
randomized multi-restart local search over strings, repaired for feasibility, keeping the best weighted acceptance found
